x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Demand records provide the intake data Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure demand management for IT and business demands. Ensure demands have complete descriptions, categories, and business value scores. Target: 50+ active demands.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c02
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Demand records provide the intake data Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Demand Management Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('dmn_demand');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' active demand records';

    if (total >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' active demands — sufficient history for Now Assist SPM AI portfolio optimization and resource allocation recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' active demands (target: 50+). Now Assist SPM AI prioritization will have limited portfolio coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' active demands. Now Assist SPM requires sufficient demand history for AI prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPM</module><number>CHK0000468</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Configure demand management for IT and business demands. Ensure demands have complete descriptions, categories, and business value scores. Target: 50+ active demands.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c02</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Demand Management Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c02</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
